heading: Unrivalled service & expertise
description: From initial enquiry through to project completion, we deliver work to the highest possible industry standard — meeting both PSA performance specification and BS EN 12825.

cards.title: Specialist contractor
cards.description: Leading specialists in computer and raised flooring, handling everything from speculative offices to data & I.T. centres.

cards.title: Tate backed
cards.description: As an approved Tate agent and contracting partner, we have the support of the world leader in access flooring.

cards.title: Qualified installers
cards.description: Fully trained, CSCS-certified installers ready for technically intricate, noise- or time-sensitive projects.

cards.title: Quick-start ready
cards.description: A large number of panels held in stock plus flexible, out-of-hours and 24/7 working when your schedule demands it.
